title: G400-3-1 Becoming and Ceasing to Be a Registrant (GST 400-3-1) - Canada.ca
content:
## G400-3-1 CANCELLED - Becoming and Ceasing to Be a Registrant (GST 400-3-1)

## This publication was cancelled
This publication has been cancelled as of 2026-06-03 and replaced with GST/HST memoradum 8-5, Becoming and Ceasing to be a Registrant .
